common.tagline: The Resistance · gather your court and uncover the traitors

home.rosterHint: Set everyone's name in advance; blanks become "Player X". You can adjust later in the room.

lobby.tooManyEvil: Too many evil special roles: {used} selected, only {budget} evil slots. Disable one.
lobby.startWithEmpty: {empty} empty seat(s) — latecomers can claim them after start
lobby.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to begin…
lobby.descOberon: Evil, but unknown to other evil players
lobby.descLady: Inspect a player's alignment after missions 2–4

Merlin.name: Merlin
Merlin.blurb: You know the servants of evil — but reveal yourself and the Assassin will strike.

Percival.name: Percival
Percival.blurb: You see Merlin and Morgana, but cannot tell which is which.

LoyalServant.name: Loyal Servant of Arthur
LoyalServant.blurb: You serve the realm with a pure heart and no secret knowledge.

Morgana.name: Morgana
Morgana.blurb: You appear as Merlin to Percival, sowing doubt among the good.

Assassin.name: Assassin
Assassin.blurb: If evil loses the missions, you may still win by slaying Merlin.

Oberon.name: Oberon
Oberon.blurb: You are evil, but unknown to your allies — and they to you.

Mordred.name: Mordred
Mordred.blurb: You are hidden from Merlin himself. Evil's greatest secret.

Minion.name: Minion of Mordred
Minion.blurb: You know your fellow servants of evil. Undermine every quest.

seat.claimToJoin: Claim an empty seat to join the game

roleReveal.title: Your Secret Role
roleReveal.tapWhenReady: Tap the card when you are ready to look.
roleReveal.seeNothing: The shadows reveal nothing. Trust your wits alone.

game.spectating: Spectating — you see only public information

mission.protectionRound: 🛡 Mission 4 is a “two-fail” quest: needs 2 fail cards to fail
mission.tapForHistory: Tap a quest to see its details

vote.title: Vote on the Team
vote.castWaiting: Your vote is cast. Awaiting the others…

missionVote.title: The Quest Unfolds
missionVote.twoFailsNeeded: two fails needed to spoil it
missionVote.sealed: Your card is sealed. Awaiting the rest of the party…
missionVote.watchAfar: You watch from afar as the chosen knights embark…
missionVote.loyalOnlySuccess: As a loyal servant, you may only grant success.

lady.title: The Lady of the Lake
lady.chooseExamine: Choose one soul to examine their allegiance
lady.onlyYouSeen: Only you have seen this. The quest continues…
lady.notYours: The Lady's gaze is not yours to direct.

assassin.title: The Assassin Strikes
assassin.goodPrevailed: Good has prevailed on the quests — but if Merlin falls, evil yet triumphs.
assassin.nameMerlin: Name the one you believe to be Merlin.
assassin.contemplating: The Assassin contemplates their fateful choice…

gameOver.reasonThreeMissions: by the outcome of the quests
gameOver.reasonFiveRejections: the realm fell into discord — five teams rejected

log.hammerEvilWins: Five teams rejected in a row — evil wins!
log.ladyBegins: The Lady of the Lake awakens — {holder} holds the token
log.ladyInspected: {holder} examined {target} with the Lady of the Lake
log.goodWinsMissions: Good completes three missions — the realm is saved!
log.goodWinsMissionsAssassin: Good completes three missions — but the Assassin has one strike left
log.evilWinsMissions: Evil sabotages three missions — darkness wins!
log.assassinHitMerlin: The Assassin found Merlin — evil wins!
log.assassinMissed: The Assassin struck in vain — good wins!

perceive.evil: You see {player} as a servant of evil
perceive.merlin-or-morgana: You see {player} as Merlin or Morgana

log.youApproved: Mission {round}, proposal {proposal}: you voted to approve
log.youRejected: Mission {round}, proposal {proposal}: you voted to reject

admin.panelOpened: ⚠ {actor} enabled referee mode — everyone please verify
admin.unbound: ⚠ {actor} unbound {target} (the seat can now be re-claimed)
admin.proposedFor: ⚠ {actor} proposed the team on behalf of leader {leader}

proposal.label: Proposal
proposal.hammerWarnLast: Final proposal — one more rejection and evil wins!

admin.title: Referee Tools
admin.enableHint: Enabling referee tools lets you unbind players, vote, or propose on their behalf. Every action is logged publicly in red for the whole table to see.
admin.unbindHint: Boot the player from their seat. The seat becomes open for anyone to re-claim and take over the identity with full history.
admin.proposeHint: Pick {size} member(s) for the current leader

replay.title: Battle Replay
replay.noApprovedTeam: No team approved this round (consecutive rejections)
